Result.Name: Pre Final Hold
Result.HoldReason: to prevent a finaled date from being placed on any permits (master or sub) when this type of hold is placed on a record.
Result.Comments:
RBPR-144560-2025, CBPR-144566-2025, and RABS-144915-2025 must be closed simultaneously.  

The CBPR, RBPR, and RABS will remain open until the dwelling is converted back to a residence and the garage is no longer used as a sales office. At that time, all three permits will receive a CO and two (2) COCs to sell the dwelling as a residence. 

This is standard practice in Wake County.

Result.Name: Pre Issuance Hold
Result.HoldReason: to prevent an issue date from being placed on any permits (master or sub) when this type of hold is placed on a record.
